seoTitle: Nadia vs Nailsworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nadia and Nailsworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nadia and Nailsworth.
heading: Nadia vs Nailsworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nadia, South Australia and Nailsworth, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nadia has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Nailsworth (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nadia or Nailsworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nadia has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Nailsworth scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nadia scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Nailsworth scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nadia or Nailsworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nadia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
